_metadata.source: Arlington County Zoning Ordinance, Article 3 - Density and Dimensional Standards, §3.2
_metadata.notes: Setback and yard requirements for one-family dwellings in R districts

front_yard.description: Front yard setback from street right-of-way
front_yard.rule: Larger of: 50 feet from street centerline OR 25 feet from street right-of-way line
front_yard.height_ratio_rule: No closer to centerline than 50% of building height

side_yard.description: Side yard requirements for one-family dwellings
side_yard.rule: Aggregate width of both side yards shall not be less than 30% of required lot width
side_yard.notes: Individual side yard minimums vary; typically 8-10 feet minimum per side

rear_yard.notes: On interior lots, no structure shall be located closer than 25 feet from rear lot line

accessory_buildings.description: Setbacks for accessory buildings in R districts
